questions.question: What is the causal mask, mechanically?
options: An N×N upper-triangular matrix of −inf added to attention scores before softmax — exp(−inf) = 0, so each position attends only to itself and earlier positions; one torch.tril() call
A filter on the tokenizer vocabulary
A hash of the input sequence
questions.explanation: "The most consequential single line of code in modern AI": GPT-1 through GPT-5, Claude, Llama, Qwen, Mistral, and DeepSeek are all decoder-only causal transformers around this mask.

questions.question: Why is the mask necessary for parallel training?
options: Each position's prediction must depend only on earlier positions or the model trivially CHEATS by reading the answer — with the mask applied once, you get N parallel next-token predictions in a single forward pass
questions.explanation: This is why GPT training scales: process a million tokens per batch in one GPU pass, with one cross-entropy loss per position summed and backpropped together.

questions.question: What is the "autoregressive tax"?
options: Training is parallel but inference is serial — each new token requires a full forward step conditioned on all previous ones, so serial depth at inference equals output length; decoding is the latency bottleneck of every LLM
Extra FLOPs from the mask itself
questions.explanation: The KV cache saves recomputing past hidden states, but can't remove the one-token-at-a-time dependency — the asymmetry that motivates speculative decoding.

questions.question: How is the next-token loss structured?
options: Shift-by-one: inputs [t1,t2,t3] predict targets [t2,t3,t4]; each position contributes −log P(target_i | inputs up to i), summed as sequence cross-entropy
questions.explanation: Pretraining, fine-tuning, SFT — same loss, different data. The entire GPT lineage differs in scale, data, and RLHF, not in this core objective.

questions.question: How do BERT and GPT divide the task landscape?
options: Bidirectional encoders excel where you need representations (classification, retrieval); causal decoders own GENERATION — the triangle mask sacrifices right-context understanding to gain the ability to sample text token by token
questions.explanation: The mask is the fork in the road: see both sides and you can't generate; see only the past and you can. Every architecture choice downstream follows from it.
